_instructions: Save to ~/Documents/Claude/lovable-to-app-store/memory/orgs/{org-slug}.json — this is the org-level file for {org-slug}. It holds the Apple Team ID and org-specific accounts. Agency-level ASC credentials live in agencies/{agency-slug}.json.
_note: Fill in FILL_IN values from your actual accounts. Do NOT store passwords here.
notes: {org-slug} is the first org under {Agency Name}. APPLE_TEAM_ID goes into GitHub secrets as the 5th secret alongside the 4 agency-level ASC secrets.
